summary: Iteration 18 - Client Dashboard new sections (Agenda, Finances, Donations, Wishlist, Suggestions, Personal Providers, Cards) fully tested. All 7 new tabs working correctly. Backend APIs: 16/16 tests passed. Frontend UI: All tabs load correctly with proper data display.
seed_data_creation: Test donations created during backend testing (TEST_Association Caritative, TEST_Fondation Anonyme)
context_for_next_testing_agent: All new client dashboard sections are fully functional. Finances shows real data (1000 CHF spent, 85.47 CHF cashback). Cards form has full 16-digit card number input, CVV, and card type selection. Agenda allows creating events with date/time/location.

agenda_tab.details: Tab displays 'Mon Agenda' header with 'Nouveau rendez-vous' button. Modal form includes: Title, Type (dropdown), Date & Heure début/fin (datetime-local inputs), Lieu, Description. Empty state shows 'Aucun rendez-vous planifié' with 'Ajouter un rendez-vous' button.

finances_tab.details: Shows real data from database: Total dépensé (1000.00 CHF), Cashback disponible (85.47 CHF), Cashback gagné (12.00 CHF), Économies (1.2%). Includes 'Détails des dépenses' section (Commandes, Formations, counts) and 'Dernières transactions' showing recent orders.

donations_tab.details: Shows 'Mes Donations' header with 'Faire un don' button. Stats cards show Total donné (70.00 CHF) and Donations effectuées (4). Donation list displays recipient name, date, message, and amount. Modal form for new donation includes: Montant, Bénéficiaire, Message, Anonymous checkbox.

wishlist_tab.details: Shows 'Ma Liste de Souhaits' header. Empty state displays 'Votre liste de souhaits est vide' with 'Découvrir nos prestataires' button. Items would show image, enterprise name, item name, price, and 'Voir le détail' link.

suggestions_tab.details: Shows 'Suggestions de mes contacts' header with description 'Découvrez ce que vos amis ont aimé et ajouté à leurs favoris'. Empty state shows 'Aucune suggestion disponible' with 'Ajoutez des amis pour voir leurs recommandations'.

prestataires_tab.details: Shows 'Mes Prestataires Personnels' header with description 'Vos prestataires favoris pour un accès rapide'. Empty state shows 'Aucun prestataire enregistré' with 'Découvrir nos prestataires' button.

cards_tab.details: Production-ready form with: Full 16-digit card number input (placeholder '1234 5678 9012 3456'), CVV input (password type, maxLength 4), Card type selection (Visa/Mastercard/Amex buttons), Month/Year dropdowns, Card holder name, Live card preview, Security notice about Stripe encryption, 'Définir comme carte par défaut' checkbox.

agenda.POST /api/client/agenda: PASS - Creates event with title, datetime, location

finances.GET /api/client/finances: PASS - Returns statistics (total_spent, cashback, orders_count, etc.) and recent transactions

donations.GET /api/client/donations: PASS - Returns donations list with total_donated and count

wishlist.GET /api/client/wishlist/check/{id}: PASS - Checks if item in wishlist

suggestions.GET /api/client/suggestions/from-friends: PASS - Returns friend suggestions (empty if no friends)

cards.POST /api/client/cards: PASS - Adds card with full details
